parsed.reason: This is a warm, natural response in authentic first-person voice ("we'll," "us"). The tone is conversational and friendly ("thanks for the heads up!"). The parent offers specific time options without inventing dates from thin air—these are clearly times the parent themselves is proposing. The format is casual and appropriate for email communication with a clinic, daycare, or similar recipient. No robotic language, no self-referential AI language, no corporate tone. It successfully passes the grounding check by only proposing times the parent would realistically offer.
